title: Classic Splashes
description: Removes (most of) the post-pandemic splashes from the main menu, and re-adds some classic splashes.
body:
![The main menu logo, with the previously removed splash "Woo, minecraftforum!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c2d80116590a42254ada6d6008ba9c159f569dd.png)

A simple resource pack that removes new splash text added after the 2020 pandemic. Also re-adds some classic splashes that have been removed over the years, for the extra nostalgic touch.
